## Process Document Update

**Which process document do you want to update?** 
(New document - README for docs folder)

## Summary of New Content

Create a comprehensive README.md file in the `docs/` folder that:
1. Provides a central entry point for all OctoAcme project management documentation
2. Includes links to all eight project management process documents
3. Contains a 3-4 paragraph overview/summary of OctoAcme's project management approach
4. Explains the purpose and scope of each linked document
5. Helps new team members quickly understand the complete project management lifecycle

## Why is this update needed?

- **Gap identified**: Currently, there is no single entry point to understand and navigate OctoAcme's project management processes
- **Onboarding improvement**: New team members need a quick way to discover and understand all available process documentation
- **Knowledge centralization**: A README serves as a hub that connects all process documents together
- **Discoverability**: Without a README, process docs are scattered and harder to find
- **Best practice**: Repositories with process documentation should have a clear README explaining structure and purpose

## Suggested Content

The README should include:

### Introduction & Purpose
Brief overview of why OctoAcme has formalized project management processes

### OctoAcme Project Management Overview
3-4 paragraph summary covering:
- Key workflows and lifecycle stages (Initiation → Planning → Execution → Release → Retrospective)
- Core roles and responsibilities (PM, Product Manager, Developers, QA)
- Communication cadences and coordination approach
- Quality assurance and risk management principles

### Documentation Structure

Links to all process documents:
- [OctoAcme Project Management Overview](octoacme-project-management-overview.md) - High-level introduction to OctoAcme's approach
- [Project Initiation](octoacme-project-initiation.md) - Steps to validate and authorize new work
- [Project Planning](octoacme-project-planning.md) - Creating actionable plans and backlogs
- [Execution & Tracking](octoacme-execution-and-tracking.md) - Day-to-day delivery and progress management
- [Risk Management & Communication](octoacme-risks-and-communication.md) - Risk identification, mitigation, and stakeholder communication
- [Release & Deployment](octoacme-release-and-deployment.md) - Standardized release processes
- [Retrospective & Continuous Improvement](octoacme-retrospective-and-continuous-improvement.md) - Learning and iterative improvement
- [Roles & Personas](octoacme-roles-and-personas.md) - Defined roles and responsibilities

### Key Artifacts
Overview of important documents teams create (Project Charter, Risk Register, Release Notes, etc.)

### Getting Started
Quick guidance for:
- Starting a new project
- Finding answers to common questions
- Contributing improvements to these docs

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Content aligns with existing process docs
- [ ] Update improves clarity or closes a documented gap
- [ ] Proposed content has been reviewed with stakeholders (if needed)
